channel.title: Index on Samet Aylak
channel.description: Recent content in Index on Samet Aylak

item.title: About
item.description: Hello everyone, My name is Samet Aylak and I am a Software Developer at Protel. My main interests are CI/CD Pipelines, Go, Javascript, Ruby-Crystal, Docker, Kubernetes. Also you can find me in Medium, Github, Twitter and LinkedIn. Medium Github Twitter LinkedIn In this blog, you can join me on my career adventures. Every day I am learning new kinds of stuff about programming and I will share these experiences with you as much as I can.
